mnemonics.title: Docker Layers
mnemonics.content: LOW FAT: Layers Optimize Weight, Filesystem Abstraction Through union mounts

acronyms.expansion: Distributed Open Container Kernel for Efficient Runtime

visualTips.visualization: Imagine shipping containers - standardized units carrying different cargo (apps) on same ship (host)

analogies.analogy: Like restaurant stations (grill, salad, bakery) working independently but serving same meal
